text: Make repeated and overlapping statement imports duplicate-safe and conflict-explicit.
target: Re-importing identical content or an overlapping statement creates no second canonical transaction for the same exact source fact; non-identical identity reuse or merely similar matches fail with stable reviewable conflicts. Evidence: analogous — LEDGER idempotent writes; deterministic source-row identity remains assumption A3 and the OQ-INGEST-4 spike gate.
